title: anacyclus radiatus subsp. radiatus
intro: Anacyclus radiatus subsp. radiatus, also known as the 'pineapple anacyclus', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as indigestion, nausea, and stomach pain, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anacyclus radiatus subsp. radiatus include relieving headaches, reducing fever, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Anacyclus radiatus subsp. radiatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
